steps.title: Recognize the contrast task
steps.content: To contrast the two songs, the answer must mention both songs and show what differs between them. The notes reveal: one addresses labor conditions in Kentucky coal mines, the other addresses political imprisonment in South Africa.

steps.title: Identify the choice that accomplishes the contrast
steps.content: Only the credited option contrasts the two songs by showing their different subjects. The other choices describe only one song, while another response mentions both but stresses their similarity. That confirms A is correct.
